metadata.name: Combat Name HUD
metadata.description:
Combat Name HUD is a customizable combat name overlay that adds readable HUD labels for bosses during boss fights and temporary labels for regular enemies when they are hit.
Labels can be positioned in a fixed HUD spot, above the entity, or below the entity, with separate settings for bosses and enemies.
Main features: - Boss and enemy combat name labels. - Fixed, above-entity, and below-entity position modes. - Scale, offset, alpha, line spacing, and enemy display-time controls. - Preset colors, custom RGB, Rainbow mode, and HP-based color mode. - Boss intro animations, active label effects, and death effects. - Champion-themed styling with optional descriptors. - Hit flash, hit scale punch, and reactive shake feedback. - Multi-boss support with repeated boss grouping. - Mod Config Menu integration with live previews and an animated Info showcase. - Compatible with current Mod Config Menu versions and forks.
Requirements: - The Binding of Isaac: Repentance - Mod Config Menu (Pure/Impure)
Optional: - REPENTOGON is supported and recommended for the most accurate champion detection and modded entity names, but the mod has safe fallback paths when REPENTOGON-specific features are unavailable.
Version 1.0.0 By Daft Fox
